---
title: "Data transformation with dplyr"
code-line-numbers: false
---

```{=html}
<iframe class="slide-deck" width="780" height="500" src="slides/dplyr.html"></iframe>
```

[Slides in full screen](slides/dplyr.html){target="_blank"} &nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp; <a href="slides/dplyr.pdf" download>Download PDF slides</a>

# Task

:::{.callout-note}
Find the solution here after the session ends.

```{=html}
<script>const course_day = 2;</script>
<script src="../timer_solution.js"></script>
<p class="r_class_solution" style="display:none">
  <a href="solutions/dplyr.html" target="_blank">Click here for the solution.</a>
</p>
```
:::

{{< include tasks/dplyr.qmd >}}
